name: ComputerKeyboard
short_description: ComputerKeyboard is a program designed to teach touch typing — typing without looking at the keyboard. The available national keyboard layouts allow you to practice on both local and foreign keyboards. As you progress, the number of keys increases, while the response time becomes shorter.
detailed_description:
You begin your journey with ComputerKeyboard by practicing just four basic keys. As you progress, the number of keys gradually increases — while the time allowed to press the correct key becomes shorter. Incorrect answers reduce the number of available keys, but you can expand the range at any time.

ComputerKeyboard is a lightweight program designed to help you learn touch typing — typing without looking at the keyboard.

The method is designed to naturally engage all ten fingers, helping you develop efficient and accurate typing habits.

While using ComputerKeyboard, you focus on what truly matters: you don’t type words or sentences. Instead, you look at the screen displaying keys in the layout of your chosen keyboard, and your fingers instinctively respond to randomly selected keys. This encourages proper hand positioning and trains your fingers to automatically recognize each letter.

The program supports learning on a wide range of keyboard layouts, including:
Austrian, English, American, Arabic, Azerbaijani, Belarusian, Bosnian, Bulgarian, Croatian, Montenegrin, Czech, Danish, Estonian, Finnish, French, Greek, Spanish, Kazakh, Lithuanian, Latvian, Moldovan, German, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Hungarian, and Italian.

Additionally, you can choose the language used for all program messages and interface prompts.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Czech, Danish, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Romanian, Swedish, Turkish, Ukrainian, Hungarian, Azerbaijani, Bangla, Belarusian, Bosnian, Croatian, Estonian, Indonesian, Irish, Icelandic, Kazakh, Lithuanian, Nepali, Serbian, Slovak, Latvian, Thai, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese
